mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% increase in the unemployment rate over 2 months signals a weakening labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A 2% increase in the GDP growth rate over 1 quarter, combined with a 1% increase in the housing starts rate, signals a strengthening demand environment, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth > 2% in 1 quarter and HOUST growth > 1%
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1% increase in the federal funds rate over 1 month signals a tightening monetary cycle, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 40% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A 1% decrease in the industrial production growth rate over 2 months signals a weakening supply environment, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A 2% increase in the retail sales growth rate over 1 quarter, combined with a 1% increase in the consumer price index growth rate, signals a strengthening demand environment, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS growth > 2% in 1 quarter and CPIAUCSL growth > 1%
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% decrease in the unemployment rate over 2 months signals a strengthening labor market, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in > 40% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A 1% decrease in the federal funds rate over 1 month, combined with a 1% increase in the money supply growth rate, signals an easing monetary cycle, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
